{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing and Sales Specialist",
  "description": "At LZJ_ESOL&rsquo;N, we are redefining how businesses and organisations leverage technology to operate smarter, faster, and more efficiently. We build scalable, data-driven solutions that solve real operational challenges and enable sustainable growth.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing and Sales Specialist

Job Location:&nbsp;Warri, Delta&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time / Hybrid
Industry: Technology / Software Development

About the Role


	LZJ Esoleen &nbsp;is a growing technology company focused on developing intelligent software solutions that help businesses improve operational efficiency, transparency, and overall business management.
	We are currently seeking a Marketing and Sales Specialist to join our team and help expand our market reach.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for identifying business opportunities, generating leads, building client relationships, and effectively communicating the value of our software solutions to potential customers.
	This role is suited for professionals who thrive in results-driven environments, understand sales performance targets, and have experience working in high-pressure marketing or sales roles such as banking, fintech, or fast-paced agencies.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct market research to identify customer needs, competitor positioning, and industry trends.
	Identify and pursue new business opportunities to generate leads and acquire clients.
	Collaborate with the product team to translate technical product features into clear and compelling customer benefits.
	Create engaging marketing and sales content for landing pages, campaigns, and promotional materials.
	Manage and optimize lead generation funnels to improve conversion rates.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with prospective and existing clients.
	Analyze marketing and sales performance metrics and adjust strategies to improve results.


Requirements


	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Ability to understand and simplify technical concepts for non-technical audiences.
	Experience in marketing, sales, or business development roles.
	Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills.
	Self-motivated, proactive, and target-driven.
	Ability to perform effectively in a fast-paced and performance-oriented environment.


What We Offer


	Competitive monthly salary ranging from N250,000 &ndash; N400,000.
	Opportunity to work with an innovative technology company.
	Hybrid work arrangement.
	Opportunities for career growth and professional development.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application alongside their CV to:&nbsp;info@lzjesoleen.com&nbsp;using &quot;Application for Marketing and Sales Position&quot;&nbsp;or &quot;Application For Marketing Position&quot; as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-16",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-16",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "LZJ_ESOL’N"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Delta",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "195960"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Marketing and Sales Specialist Job at LZJ_ESOL’N




        
    

        
        At LZJ_ESOL’N, we are redefining how businesses and organisations leverage technology to operate smarter, faster, and more efficiently. We build scalable, data-driven solutions that solve real operational challenges and enable sustainable growth.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing and Sales Specialist

Job Location: Warri, Delta 
Employment Type: Full-time / Hybrid
Industry: Technology / Software Development

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	LZJ Esoleen  is a growing technology company focused on developing intelligent software solutions that help businesses improve operational efficiency, transparency, and overall business management.
	We are currently seeking a Marketing and Sales Specialist to join our team and help expand our market reach.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for identifying business opportunities, generating leads, building client relationships, and effectively communicating the value of our software solutions to potential customers.
	This role is suited for professionals who thrive in results-driven environments, understand sales performance targets, and have experience working in high-pressure marketing or sales roles such as banking, fintech, or fast-paced agencies.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct market research to identify customer needs, competitor positioning, and industry trends.
	Identify and pursue new business opportunities to generate leads and acquire clients.
	Collaborate with the product team to translate technical product features into clear and compelling customer benefits.
	Create engaging marketing and sales content for landing pages, campaigns, and promotional materials.
	Manage and optimize lead generation funnels to improve conversion rates.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with prospective and existing clients.
	Analyze marketing and sales performance metrics and adjust strategies to improve results.


Requirements


	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Ability to understand and simplify technical concepts for non-technical audiences.
	Experience in marketing, sales, or business development roles.
	Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills.
	Self-motivated, proactive, and target-driven.
	Ability to perform effectively in a fast-paced and performance-oriented environment.


What We Offer


	Competitive monthly salary ranging from N250,000 – N400,000.
	Opportunity to work with an innovative technology company.
	Hybrid work arrangement.
	Opportunities for career growth and professional development.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application alongside their CV to: [email protected] using "Application for Marketing and Sales Position" or "Application For Marketing Position" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Direct Sales Executive Job at Premium Human Resources Solution Limited




        
    

        
        Premium Human Resources Solution - Our client is a reputable and fast-growing AgriTech–FinTech company in Ekiti State.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Direct Sales Executive 

Job Location: Ado-Ekiti, Ekiti
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are currently recruiting Sales & Marketing Executives in Ekiti State.


Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Qualification: NCE / OND / HND / BSc Degree
	Experience: Minimum of 1-year of sales/marketing experience is required


Benefits


	Monthly Salary: N100,000 - N104,000 per month.
	Robust commission, HMO, pension, 13th-month allowance, and other benefits.


Note: Candidate must be ready to work and meet targets.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service / Teller / Service Executive",
  "description": "Premium Human Resources Solution - Our client,&nbsp;a reputable commercial bank in Abuja, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service / Teller / Service Executive

Customer Service / Teller / Service Executive Job at Premium Human Resources Solution Limited




        
    

        
        Premium Human Resources Solution - Our client, a reputable commercial bank in Abuja, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service / Teller / Service Executive

Job Location: Wuseb Zone 5, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job summary


	We are seeking a proactive Service Executive to manage customer enquiries and service delivery, driving high customer satisfaction and timely resolution of issues.
	The ideal candidate should have experience in banking operations and client support.


 Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	BSc and HND only
	Must have completed NYSC or have an Exemption Letter
	Experience: At least 2 years of customer service experience, relevant IT and other Technical skills are an added advantage.
	Age: Not more than 27 years.


Benefit


	Monthly Salary: N200,000 - N215,000
	HMO, pension, and other benefits.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Finance Manager",
  "description": "J3 is an FMCG distributor. We have been in existence over 8 years.&nbsp;J3 has branches in several locations; Lagos, Ibadan, Ogun, Ondo, and Osun state.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Finance Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Iyana Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Ensure all financial transactions and records are accurately maintained for J3 Foods and Stores International.
	Ensure timely and accurate preparation of financial statements (monthly, quarterly, annual) for all outlets.
	Ensure accurate reconciliation of inventory transactions (purchases, movements, write-offs) in alignment with accounting standards.
	Collaborate with the warehouse department to validate stock reports and minimize discrepancies between physical and book inventory.
	Review and approve balance sheet reconciliations (bank, inventory, receivables, payables).
	Manage and mentor Account Officers across all distribution outlets.
	Conduct monthly performance reviews and ensure adherence to accounting procedures.
	mplement standardized accounting processes across all locations.
	Resolve complex accounting issues escalated by Account Officers.
	Approve payment vouchers, petty cash, and bank reconciliations.
	Ensure payroll is processed correctly and on time, including accurate deductions and remittances.
	Manage and monitor payment systems to verify incoming payments.
	Oversee cost accounting and ensure proper allocation of expenses.
	Implement cost-saving measures without compromising operational efficiency.
	Monitor trade promotions, discounts, and rebate accounting.
	Validate sales reports and ensure revenue recognition aligns with accounting standards.
	Ensure timely filing of VAT, corporate taxes, and other statutory obligations.
	Stay updated on changes in tax laws affecting FMCG distribution.
	Implement internal controls to prevent fraud and errors.
	Train Account Officers on new accounting processes and policies.
	Prepare financial reports to MD/CEO and General manager.
	Advise the management on investment opportunities and ways to improve profitability.


Salary
N400,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;midaasconsult@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;For more enquiries, send a WhatsApp message to:09152781100.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "J3 Holdings"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "195957"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 400000,
      "maxValue": 600000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Senior Finance Manager Job at J3 Holdings




        
    

        
        J3 is an FMCG distributor. We have been in existence over 8 years. J3 has branches in several locations; Lagos, Ibadan, Ogun, Ondo, and Osun state.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Finance Manager

Job Location: Iyana Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Ensure all financial transactions and records are accurately maintained for J3 Foods and Stores International.
	Ensure timely and accurate preparation of financial statements (monthly, quarterly, annual) for all outlets.
	Ensure accurate reconciliation of inventory transactions (purchases, movements, write-offs) in alignment with accounting standards.
	Collaborate with the warehouse department to validate stock reports and minimize discrepancies between physical and book inventory.
	Review and approve balance sheet reconciliations (bank, inventory, receivables, payables).
	Manage and mentor Account Officers across all distribution outlets.
	Conduct monthly performance reviews and ensure adherence to accounting procedures.
	mplement standardized accounting processes across all locations.
	Resolve complex accounting issues escalated by Account Officers.
	Approve payment vouchers, petty cash, and bank reconciliations.
	Ensure payroll is processed correctly and on time, including accurate deductions and remittances.
	Manage and monitor payment systems to verify incoming payments.
	Oversee cost accounting and ensure proper allocation of expenses.
	Implement cost-saving measures without compromising operational efficiency.
	Monitor trade promotions, discounts, and rebate accounting.
	Validate sales reports and ensure revenue recognition aligns with accounting standards.
	Ensure timely filing of VAT, corporate taxes, and other statutory obligations.
	Stay updated on changes in tax laws affecting FMCG distribution.
	Implement internal controls to prevent fraud and errors.
	Train Account Officers on new accounting processes and policies.
	Prepare financial reports to MD/CEO and General manager.
	Advise the management on investment opportunities and ways to improve profitability.


Salary
N400,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquiries, send a WhatsApp message to:09152781100.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketer",
  "description": "At Lauvee Beauty Salon, we are dedicated to helping our clients look and feel their best. Our salon offers a wide range of beauty and hair services, including hairstyling, braiding, lash extensions, wig installations, and more &mdash; all delivered with professionalism and creativity.

We pride ourselves on providing exceptional customer service in a welcoming, modern, and hygienic environment. At Lauvee, we value teamwork, innovation, and continuous growth, making it a great place for both clients and staff to thrive.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketer

Job Location:&nbsp;Wuse 2,&nbsp; Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Promote Lauvee Beauty Salon services to attract new clients
	Visit hotels, offices, and businesses to introduce the salon
	Build parternerships with hotels and organisations
	Distribute flyers and marketing materials
	Manange basic online promotion and client engagement
	Bring in new clients and increase salon visibility.


Requirements


	Good communication and interpersonnal skills
	Must be responsible and professional
	Must be based in Abuja and stay close to Wuse 2
	Previous experience in marketing or administration is an added advantage.


Salary
N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and contact details to:&nbsp;lauveebeauty@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Marketer Job at Lauvee Beauty Salon




        
    

        
        At Lauvee Beauty Salon, we are dedicated to helping our clients look and feel their best. Our salon offers a wide range of beauty and hair services, including hairstyling, braiding, lash extensions, wig installations, and more — all delivered with professionalism and creativity.

We pride ourselves on providing exceptional customer service in a welcoming, modern, and hygienic environment. At Lauvee, we value teamwork, innovation, and continuous growth, making it a great place for both clients and staff to thrive.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketer

Job Location: Wuse 2,  Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Description


	Promote Lauvee Beauty Salon services to attract new clients
	Visit hotels, offices, and businesses to introduce the salon
	Build parternerships with hotels and organisations
	Distribute flyers and marketing materials
	Manange basic online promotion and client engagement
	Bring in new clients and increase salon visibility.


Requirements


	Good communication and interpersonnal skills
	Must be responsible and professional
	Must be based in Abuja and stay close to Wuse 2
	Previous experience in marketing or administration is an added advantage.


Salary
N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and contact details to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
